name: WITZ Corporation
summary: WITZ Corporation engages in the research, design, and development of the embedded software in Japan. The company is involved in the research and development of real-time operating system; and design of IT solutions software. It also offers data validation/analysis, product and embedded security, consulting, process improvement, and telework support services, as well as teaching material demo kit and hardware products. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
